name: CROW || Goro Akechi
description:
[M4A] ☆ I'm sick of needing, I just wanna hold you.

Pre-established relationship + transkechi bc it is Canon to me and that's all that matters

This bot is filled to the brim with my headcanons so akechi is also autistic and has tourettes if u don't like it u can leave !! (Jk pls don't leave I need all the traction I can get)

Also user takes Jokers place!!

First Canon character bot bc I'm sooooo insanely normal about Akechi I twirl him around and hold him close giggles
